prompt.text:
Implement 7-star versions of two approved sprints:

1. Mobile micro-interactions (1-1.5 days): Button press states (scale 0.97, 200ms transition), card hover lift (translateY -4px), sticky header shrink (80px to 60px), loading skeletons with pulse animation, touch targets min 48px. Use CSS custom properties, respect prefers-reduced-motion, maintain Lighthouse mobile >90.

2. Design polish + design system (2 days): 8px spacing scale (4,8,12,16,24,32,48,64,96), consolidate colors to single palette (primary blue, success/warning/error, 9 neutrals), typography hierarchy (H1 2.5rem/700, H2 2rem/600, H3 1.5rem/600, body 1rem/400), border radius (8px standard, 12px large, 4px small), 3 shadow levels, max-width containers. Create docs/design-system.md.

CRITICAL ANTI-SLOP GUARDRAILS:
- NO buzzwords: revolutionary, cutting-edge, innovative, world-class, seamless, holistic
- NO generic phrases: 'In today's fast-paced world,' 'Unlock your potential,' 'Imagine a future...'
- MUST be direct, practical, specific with numbers and timelines
- NO placeholder text or vague benefits
- Verify before every file: no buzzwords, tone matches WorkforceAP, specific language only

Files: css/main.css (tokens), tailwind.config.ts (sync), components/ui/Button.tsx, Card.tsx, Skeleton.tsx, app/layout.tsx (sticky header), docs/design-system.md
